chunks.title: Introduction and Purpose
chunks.reason: The poet introduces the song as a Maskil of Asaph, calling Israel to listen to history so future generations remember God's deeds.

chunks.title: The Rebellion of Ephraim
chunks.reason: A specific historical critique of the tribe of Ephraim for their cowardice and failure to keep the covenant.

chunks.title: Testing God in the Wilderness
chunks.reason: The narrative of Israel's complaint for food, God's provision of manna and quail, and their subsequent judgment.

chunks.title: The Cycle of Sin and Mercy
chunks.reason: A reflection on the futility of Israel's lives due to sin, contrasted with God's compassion and repeated forgiveness.

chunks.title: Recall of the Plagues
chunks.reason: A summary list of the signs and miracles performed in Egypt to demonstrate God's power.

chunks.title: Entry into Canaan and Shiloh
chunks.reason: The journey to the holy land, the driving out of nations, and the subsequent failure at Shiloh.

chunks.title: Selection of Zion and David
chunks.reason: The conclusion describing God's choice of Judah over Ephraim and the anointing of King David.
